column2: A cloud environment dedicated to one organization is a {{c1::private cloud}}.
column3: Private cloud is about restricted organizational use, not only where the hardware is located.
column4: This Cloze supports compact deployment-model recall. The scenario version is covered separately by 4.2-B002.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 pp.47-48
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze Cloud PrivateCloud Source::Messer-v170

column2: A provider cloud service broadly available over the Internet to many customers is a {{c1::public cloud}}.
column3: Public cloud does not mean customer data is public.
column4: This compact recall card is intentionally separate from the public-cloud scenario card.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 pp.47-48
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze Cloud PublicCloud Source::Messer-v170

column2: A cloud deployment that combines private cloud and public cloud resources is a {{c1::hybrid cloud}}.
column3: Hybrid cloud is defined by the combination of deployment models.
column4: The Basic card tests applied recognition; this Cloze tests the short definition.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.47
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze Cloud HybridCloud Source::Messer-v170

column2: A cloud environment shared by several organizations with common requirements is a {{c1::community cloud}}.
column3: Community cloud is shared by a defined group, not by the entire public.
column4: This supports quick term recall for a model learners often confuse with public cloud.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.47
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze Cloud CommunityCloud Source::Messer-v170

column3: IaaS provides infrastructure resources such as compute, storage, networking, and virtualization.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.47
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze HighYield Cloud IaaS Source::Messer-v170

column3: PaaS provides an application platform or framework rather than just raw infrastructure.
column4: Keep this Cloze to acronym recall; the Basic card handles scenario recognition.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.47
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze HighYield Cloud PaaS Source::Messer-v170

column3: SaaS delivers a complete application as a cloud service.
column4: This card is intentionally compact because the applied model distinction is covered by 4.2-B008.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.47
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze HighYield Cloud SaaS Source::Messer-v170

column2: In cloud traffic metering, {{c1::ingress}} enters the cloud service and {{c2::egress}} leaves the cloud service.
column3: Traffic direction can matter for cloud usage reporting and billing.
column4: This is compact term recall. The Basic card covers the same terms as a practical cost-direction distinction.
column8: CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 4.2; Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.48
column9: A+::220-1201::4.2 A+::220-1201::Domain4-VirtualizationCloud A+::220-1201::CloudComputingConcepts Cloze Cloud Metered Networking Source::Messer-v170
